title: tephrosia langlassei
intro: Tephrosia langlassei, also known as Langlasse's horsefly tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia langlassei include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia langlassei may be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds using solvents like ethanol or methanol.
